title: arenaria serpyllifolia var. cantabrica
intro: Arenaria serpyllifolia var. cantabrica, also known as Cantabrian thyme or Cantabrian sandwort, is a variety of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Arenaria serpyllifolia var. cantabrica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
